name: DoD zero-trust profile: unrestricted ingress is forbidden under least privilege
command:
printf 'resource "x" { encrypt = true
 logging = true
 cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"]
}
' > open.tf
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-conventions.sh" --tool terraform --iac open.tf --ruleset "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-conventions/dod-zero-trust.yaml"
